title: Vizcaino PRR — Responsive Materials (2025-06-06)
description: Official Massachusetts Public Records Request (PRR) production dated 2025-06-06, comprising materials responsive to the Vizcaino matter, produced by MassAbility (Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission) as custodial state agency. Binary PDF; not text-extracted. Records released in response to a formal public-records request under M.G.L. c.66 §10.

source.publisher: MassAbility (Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission), Commonwealth of Massachusetts

notes: Binary PDF (~220 KB); not text-extracted, so no machine-readable column structure. No standalone public URL for this production; the repo tree URL is a locator. Custodian is MassAbility/MRC. temporal_coverage is the production date (internal data period not determinable from the binary).
